text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, September 08. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Let's get that resolved. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted the plans. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
